hooks.command: echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '(package-lock\.json|out/|node_modules/)' && echo 'BLOCK: Do not edit generated files (package-lock.json, out/, node_modules/)' && exit 1 || exit 0
echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -q 'models/decision' && npx vitest run tests/logic.test.ts --reporter=verbose 2>&1 | tail -20 || true
